title: eBay will acquire Depop from Etsy for $1.2B
text: eBay announced it will acquire Depop from Etsy for approximately $1.2 billion in cash. The acquisition represents eBay's strategic move to expand in the fast-growing resale market, particularly among Gen Z fashion enthusiasts. Depop generated $788.9 million in gross merchandise sales in 2024, with U.S. sales surging 60%, making it the fastest-growing fashion resale platform in the domestic market. For Etsy, the sale allows the company to focus on its core marketplace where it can achieve higher returns on capital. The transaction is expected to close by the end of Q3 2026. Depop's success in the resale market despite overall Etsy marketplace challenges highlights the specific opportunities in vertical market segments. The sale reflects Etsy's strategic decision to divest from lower-margin subsidiaries and concentrate on core marketplace profitability and AI-driven growth initiatives.
